result.evidence_summary: No evidence of a 'Muju Taekwondo Ski Marathon' cross-country ski race was found in the search results. While Muju is confirmed as a real location in South Korea with both a Taekwondowon complex and skiing facilities (Muju Deogyugsan Resort), there is no mention of an organized cross-country ski marathon event by that name. The search results reference taekwondo events and winter tourism activities in Muju, but no cross-country ski race.
